content:
# Contact Us

The best way to keep in touch with Parabola Center and support our work is through [our Substack, The Parabola Papers](https://parabolacenter.substack.com/). You can also follow Parabola Center on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/parabolacenter), [Instagram](https://instagram.com/parabolacenter), and [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/parabolacenter/). Or email us directly at [shaleen@parabolacenter.com](mailto:shaleen@parabolacenter.com), [shanel@parabolacenter.com](mailto:shanel@parabolacenter.com), or [laury@parabolacenter.com](mailto:laury@parabolacenter.com).

**Notice for event organizers**: Before submitting an inquiry, please note that Parabola Center does not participate in events run or sponsored by groups whose interests conflict with our mission. Across every emerging industry, we decline events backed by the corporations seeking to monopolize these markets, or by groups that work against equity, small businesses, and the communities most affected by them.
